texto: I don't really think I feel pressured to become a teen sensation because that's not really my goal in life. It's not really about being star, being popular or having lots of girls. It's really about continuing to be able to act and have fun, and do what I like to do.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Chris Massoglia: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't really think I feel pressured to become a teen sensation because that's not really my goa…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, vida, goal pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de goal e fun.

frase_original: I don't really think I feel pressured to become a teen sensation because that's not really my goal in life. It's not really about being star, being popular or having lots of girls. It's really about continuing to be able to act and have fun, and do what I like to do.
